old_exact:
This Court affirmed, but for a different reason. Id. ¶ 15. the

[¶15] In affirming, we distinguished between whether test was "administered under" N.D.C.C. § 39-20-01 or N.D.C.C. § 39-20-01.1.
new_exact:
This Court affirmed, but for a different reason. Id. ¶ 15.

[¶15] In affirming, we distinguished between whether the test was "administered under" N.D.C.C. § 39-20-01 or N.D.C.C. § 39-20-01.1.
source: PDF pdftotext extraction shows 'whether the test was' with correct article; DB has orphaned 'the' at end of prior line and 'whether test was' in subsequent paragraph
note: Single error manifesting as: (1) stray 'the' at end of 'Id. ¶ 15.' and (2) missing article in 'whether test was'. Both corrections required to fix one ingestion defect. The word 'the' was inadvertently relocated during OCR/ingestion process.
